view.title: View Enchanted Crystal {id}
view.reinstallNote: Thou canst re-conjure from the left portal menu
view.cpanelNote: Control sanctum needs to be installed upon a pristine enchantment layer with no modifications. If there be any data it shall be lost.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Art thou certain thou wishest to resend the welcoming stone?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcoming stone hath been resent. Check thy inbox.

order.title: Conjure Enchanted Crystal
order.rootPasswordNote: Note: Incantation must contain at least 8 runes, one lowercase rune, one uppercase rune, one numeral, and a special sigil.
order.agreeToTerms: Bind thyself to the covenant terms
order.subscriptionRenewal: The binding shall automatically renew after {period} at {cost} until dispelled.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By marking this rune, thou dost acknowledge that thou art conjuring a subscription product that automatically renews and is billed to the payment rune thou dost provide today. If thou dost wish to dispel thy auto-renewal, thou mayest access the patron portal select the enchanted service and click the Dispel portal or send a stone to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By marking the rune and clicking Place My Conjuration below, thou dost also acknowledge thou hast read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.tosAgree: I have read the terms above and I bind myself.

buyIp.title: Additional Ether Address Addon for thy Enchanted Crystal

buyHdSpace.title: Additional Stone Tablet Capacity for Enchanted Crystal
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Minimum 1 up to 100GB additional stone tablet capacity can be conjured

changeRootPassword.title: Alter Enchanted Crystal Master Incantation
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Incantation and Bind Incantation do not match

changeTimezone.title: Alter {module} Temporal Zone
changeTimezone.importantNote1: Thou shouldst slumber thy {module} completely before altering the temporal zone.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: Enchanted Crystal shall be Powered OFF and reawakened during the process.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: The temporal zone on this parchment shall always default to America/New_York regardless of what thy iron golem is set to.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Alter Webuzo Master Incantation
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Incantation and Bind Incantation do not match

reinstallOs.title: Re-Conjure Enchantment Layer
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Re-conjuring the enchantment layer shall banish all data.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before re-conjuring the enchantment layer, prithee extract a vault copy.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: I wish to re-conjure the Enchantment Layer!

resetPassword.title: Undo Enchantment Crystal Incantation
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows incantation reset shall result in an unclean slumber. Prithee consider this a last resort option. Verify in VNC that no enchantments are currently applying. If an enchantment is applying VNC shall show: Windows is applying updates, do not shut down. Forcing slumber in this state can result in an unbootable construct.
resetPassword.confirmReset: I wish to Undo the Enchantment on the Incantation!

reverseDns.title: Reverse Summoning Registry
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Changes to reverse summoning registry take up to an hour to manifest.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available only upon the Windows Platform. Remote desktop is a swift and convenient way to bind to a mystical construct's desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Master Incantation must first be set upon the Enchanted Crystal before thou canst use remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Bind with VNC or HTML5 VNC to set thy initial incantation.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial traverse
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC allows thee to bind to the mystical construct's desktop. VNC can be run in the scrying glass or as a stand-alone client. Thy ether address must be granted access before the binding can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Thy Ether Address access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Patience, apprentice — 2 minutes for the action to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: Thou canst also extract one of many VNC clients available in the aether. We recommend TightVNC. Bind using thy Enchanted Crystal ether address. Incantation is not required after thy remote ether address hath been granted in step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To bind using HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client that runs well in any modern scrying glass including mobile scrying glasses (iOS and Android).

setupVnc.title: Conjure VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: Ether Address to grant VNC access
setupVnc.grantAccess: Grant VNC Access to Ether Address

insertCd.insertIso: Insert ISO Sigil In CDROM Drive
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Enter a CD or DVD ISO Portal URL

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Vault copies shall only work with default partitioning.
backup.confirmBackup: Dost thou truly wish to create a vault copy?

restore.offlineNote: Thy iron golem shall be offline whilst it replaces all thy current scrolls with those in the vault copy. Prithee consult the arcane council with any questions.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Enter Tower Entry Incantation to Validate Restoration.
restore.confirmRestore: Dost thou truly wish to restore this vault copy?

trafficUsage.title: Ether Flow / Arcane Traffic Usage
trafficUsage.billingNote: This is not used for treasury calculations and is an estimate only based on thy virtual ether cards.

slices.title: Ascend / Diminish Crystal Shards
slices.slicesNote: Up to 32 Crystal Shards can be bound to an Enchanted Crystal.
slices.proratedNote: Prorated gold to be rendered now.
slices.recurringBillNote: Recurring tithe shall change by this much
slices.newInvoiceNote: New debt scrolls shall cost this much
slices.confirmLabel: Aye I wish to do this.
